Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting armor for our soldiers!

We need more recruit's cuirasses!

The federation needs more leathercrafters. I know you're a dedicated soldier, but are you a dedicated crafter?

Jaeron in the Creation Workshop is taking volunteers. To help out, start there.

The beauty in the leather starts in the pattern.

Assist the efforts. Discover skills. Bask in gratitude.
